author: claude-orchestrator

patch.value: Validated 2026-07-21: two branches editing the same item (priority vs assignee + divergent notes) merged field-level with zero conflicts; both survived, notes[] unioned; pm validate ok:true after pm history-repair --all. Fleet reference: pm-github PR #5; pm-changelog PR #83.
Adopt pm field-aware merge driver for multi-agent branch-merge safety

Add the pm-cli 2026.7.20+ field-aware git merge driver (.gitattributes fence mapping tracker artifacts to pm-item-toon/pm-item-markdown/pm-history/pm-relationship/pm-json). Bump @unbrained/pm-cli devDep floor from ^2026.7.6 to ^2026.7.21 (driver requires 2026.7.20+). Enables conflict-free field-level merge of concurrent-branch tracker edits, append-only union of history+relationship jsonl, key-level JSON config merge. Companion epic pm-cli-website-juz0.
Committed .gitattributes has pm-cli:merge-drivers fence; @unbrained/pm-cli devDep floor ^2026.7.21; lockfile synced; changelog:check passes; CI green.

value.author: claude-orchestrator
value.text: Part of fleet-wide juz0 epic; pm-github (PR #5) is the reference adoption.

value.author: claude-orchestrator
value.text: git config is per-clone; each fresh clone/CI runs pm merge install once. Post-merge run pm history-repair --all (upstream auto-hook tracked as pm-cli#623).

value.author: claude-orchestrator
value.text: Field-aware driver reconciles divergent scalar fields AND unions array fields without conflict; devDep bump requires npm install --package-lock-only or npm ci fails.

value.note: merge-driver fence written by pm merge install

message: Create chore: adopt field-aware merge driver (juz0 rollout)
